{{Quote|Now explore some more. If you find trouble keep moving. Your speeder bikes are best used for exploring, not fighting.|Qui-Gon Jinn|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''HummBike''' was a model of [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] that was manufactured by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], who employed the vehicles as scouting units prior to and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and then the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Since Wookiees, due to their large size and bulk could not comfortably ride most models of speeder bike designed for other [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]], they developed their own, more comfortably proportioned vehicles to suit the needs of motorized infantry scouts. It was different from other speeder bikes in that the rider was seated in a reclined pilot's chair that was offset from the fuselage of the speeder bike. The bike's throttle was controlled by a lever to the rider's left, and directional controls and weapons were operated by the rider's right hand. The HummBike was armed with a weak, slow-firing blaster mounted on the forward maneuvering vane as a last-ditch defense. However, like all speeder bikes, the HummBike's almost nonexistent armor and weak weaponry made it ineffective in sustained combat. The bike's speed and maneuverability allowed riders to easily evade enemies, however, and this was typically the first course of action taken by riders.

==History==
{{Quote|Now build a couple of speeder bikes.|Qui-Gon Jinn to the Wookiees on Alaris Prime|<ref name="GB" />}}
HummBikes saw some use<ref name="GB" /> between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Alaris Prime colonial war]] between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]</ref> during the [[Alaris Prime colonial war|war]] for the colonization of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] between Wookiee [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]] and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. On the recommendation of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], an advisor to the Wookiees, a mech factory was built at one of their [[Unidentified Wookiee base (shipyard)|bases]], which allowed two Hummbikes to be assembled. These speeders were made for the purpose of locating a [[Trade Federation outpost]] where [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s were manufactured. After exploring to the north of the base the Wookiee riders found no trace of the Trade Federation, leading Jinn to conclude that the outpost was located on the other side of a nearby [[Water/Legends|river]]. The two HummBike riders boarded a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] and traveled to the other side, where they disembarked and located the outpost, avoiding the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] stationed there. The rider's intelligence allowed the Wookiee leader [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to lead a force of Wookiee [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] to the [[Attack on the Trade Federation outpost|outpost]].<ref name="GB" />
